title: Planetarian Origin
description: An origin based on a living planet
body:
This datapack adds an origin themed the concept of a Living Planet origin.

Heres a list with all of its abilities:
- Celestial Diet: You regain hunger naturally at night, but you can only eat glowstone dust
- Exhausting Sunlight: When in sunlight, you get weakness and slowness
- Gravity: You can make mobs gravitate towards yourself
- Jump to the sky: You can launch yourself into the sky, but be careful when using during the day
- Night Life: At night, you get jump boost and slow fall
- Planetary scale: You are three blocks tall
- Yearn for the sky: When under a low ceiling, you get weakness and slowness
- Daysleeper: You can sleep, but only through the day

This datapack was made based on the idea posted by leothecat890 on the origins oficial server.
